name: Ora
summary: South wind strategy for Area B based on MetaSail screenshot logic

base_tactic.description: The first upwind stays mostly fixed: start, tack immediately to port tack (mure a sinistra), sail straight to the layline, tack to starboard tack, and close to the mark.
core_sequence: tack immediately to port tack (mure a sinistra)
sail straight to the layline (andare dritti)
tack to starboard tack (mure a dritta)

course_structure.inner_course_note: The inner course keeps the same logic but rounds the right gate from the screenshot, climbs briefly on starboard, then returns to port and repeats the same first-upwind logic.

rules.label: left_side_bias
rules.action: Prefer the left side when the wind map shows more pressure there.

rules.label: speed_first
rules.action: Keep the boat moving and protect speed before forcing a maneuver.

rules.label: tack_for_gain
rules.trigger: A better pressure lane appears before layline
rules.action: Tack early if the gain from the stronger lane outweighs the extra distance.

rules.label: layline_closeout
rules.action: Stop searching and close the approach to the mark.

rules.label: screenshot_first
rules.action: Use the screenshot as the base map, then adjust only small left/right pressure shifts.

rules.label: small_variation_only
rules.action: Change only start choice, micro-angle, and small side bias; keep the base tactic stable.

rules.label: gate_right_inner
rules.action: Round the right gate, climb briefly on starboard, then return to port and repeat the first-upwind base tactic.

rules.label: gate_left_normal_outer
rules.trigger: Normal outer course and normal wind
rules.action: Prefer the left gate because it matches the first run and sets up the next upwind with the same field logic.

rules.label: center_right_after_right_gate
rules.trigger: Right gate chosen from screenshot logic
rules.action: After the rounding, tack early and sail a center-right race lane, watching for more oscillations and small gains on that side.

rules.label: inside_reach_gain
rules.trigger: Reach leg with some boats going too far outside
rules.action: A well-executed inside reach can gain because the outside boats may sail almost double distance.

rules.label: controlled_outside_reach
rules.trigger: Reach leg with a moderate outside lane
rules.action: If the outside lane is not too extreme, it can re-enter earlier on the upwind setup and keep the advantage.

rules.label: run_left_normal
rules.trigger: Normal run and normal Ora field
rules.action: The right side has less wind, so the left side of the run is usually better.

rules.label: run_inside_center_south_left
rules.trigger: Wind comes from the center-south to center-left point seen from Riva del Garda
rules.action: The inside run becomes good. First upwind and second upwind should both favor the left side before tacking back into the field.

rules.label: small_right_counter_shift
rules.trigger: Left-favored special wind with a small local counter-shift
rules.action: Watch for a small local right shift where boats slightly more to the right can occasionally arrive first.

rules.label: second_upwind_same_logic
rules.action: Repeat the same first-upwind tactical logic, with left side favored in the special center-south-left wind pattern.

rules.label: start_line_preset_keys
rules.action: Q selects the committee side of the start line, W selects the center, and R selects the buoy side.

variants.name: buono_left
variants.trigger: Good wind with slightly better pressure on the left
variants.behavior: Start and sail a little more left, keep the boat fast, and tack only when the gain is clear.

variants.name: buono_right
variants.trigger: Good wind with slightly better pressure on the right
variants.behavior: Allow a small right shift only if the wind lane is stronger enough to compensate the extra distance.

variants.name: scarso_safe
variants.behavior: Protect speed, reduce risky maneuvers, and pick the more stable lane.

variants.name: special_center_south_left_wind
variants.trigger: Wind arrives from the center-south to center-left point described from Riva del Garda
variants.behavior: Go left on the first upwind, tack and repeat the same field logic, prefer the inside run, and keep the second upwind left-favored while staying alert for small right-side counter-shifts.
